notes: Phase F design complete. Integrates E4 deferred tasks (Server HTTP, BFCL expansion). 4 phases: F1 (Scorer infra) -> F2 (deepen existing) + F3 (new dimensions) -> F4 (E4 legacy + CI quality). Target: 61 -> ~161 tasks, 6 -> 10 scorers, 5 -> 8 dimensions.
